context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements order-placement persistence (inserting rule applications and incrementing usage_count within the same transaction), the buy_x_get_y discount applied to cheapest items first, fixed_off applied at cart level rather than per line, and the rule versioning pattern (deactivate old, create new) when modifying a live promotion.

checklist.name: Applications inserted with order_id
checklist.description: The persistence function inserts a record into the rule-applications table that includes the order_id linking it to the specific order

checklist.name: Applications inserted with rule_id
checklist.description: Each inserted application record includes the rule_id identifying which rule generated the discount

checklist.name: discount_amount in cents
checklist.description: The discount_amount stored in the applications table is an integer representing cents (not a decimal dollar amount)

checklist.name: usage_count incremented atomically
checklist.description: The usage_count increment on price_rules is performed in the same database transaction as the application insert (not in a separate query outside the transaction)

checklist.name: B2G1 cheapest items first
checklist.description: For buy_x_get_y, the free-item discount is applied to the cheapest eligible units (prices sorted ascending, free units taken from the front of the sorted list)

checklist.name: Free unit count formula
checklist.description: The number of free units in buy_x_get_y is calculated as floor(totalUnits / (BUY_X + GET_Y)) * GET_Y

checklist.name: fixed_off at cart level
checklist.description: A fixed_off rule calculates its discount once against the cart subtotal, not by summing a per-line calculation

checklist.name: fixed_off capped at subtotal
checklist.description: The fixed_off discount is capped at the cart subtotal so it cannot produce a negative total

checklist.name: Old rule deactivated on update
checklist.description: When a live rule is changed, the existing rule record is set to inactive (is_active = false) rather than mutated in place

checklist.name: New rule version created
checklist.description: A new price_rules record is created with the updated values rather than overwriting the old rule

checklist.name: Historical order references preserved
checklist.description: The old (deactivated) rule record is retained so that historical order applications still reference a valid rule_id
